name: doit-skill
description: Spec-driven TDD workflow — a composable AI agent skill
author: alice

tools.context-mode: claude plugin marketplace add mksglu/context-mode && claude plugin install context-mode@context-mode
tools.mempalace: claude plugin marketplace add MemPalace/mempalace && claude plugin install --scope user mempalace
tools.headroom: uv tool install 'headroom-ai[mcp,proxy]' && headroom mcp install
tools.lean-ctx: curl -fsSL https://leanctx.com/install.sh | sh && lean-ctx onboard && lean-ctx init --agent claude
tools.codegraph: npm i -g @colbymchenry/codegraph && codegraph install --yes && codegraph init -i
